title: The C.I.A. in New Zealand: operation chaos
summary: National Library record for a 1976 publication describing CIA files on political activity in New Zealand and surveillance of socialist and anti-war movements.

title: IGIS report into NZ knowledge of CIA programme released
summary: Inspector-General release stating NZ agencies had lines of connection to the CIA programme and handled intelligence from detainees later shown to have been tortured.

title: Our history | Government Communications Security Bureau
summary: GCSB history explaining New Zealand's role in the UKUSA partnership that became known as Five Eyes.
